title: End-Less
description: Changes End portals after the dragon’s defeat, adding a special return portal and a new Outer End–like dimension.
body:
## Mod Overview
This mod changes the way End portals work, especially after defeating the Ender Dragon.
# Details
## Before the Dragon is Defeated

Entering any End portal will always take you to the End’s central island for the dragon fight.

## After the First Dragon Kill

1. A special portal will spawn at (0, 300, 0) in the Overworld. Entering this portal will take you back to the dragon’s arena in minecraft:the_end.

2. Entering any other End portal (not at 0, 300, 0) will lead you to a new dimension, msg:new_end, which is similar to the Outer End but without the central dragon island.

## Travel to msg:new_end
- Your X and Z coordinates remain the same during the transfer.

- Your Y coordinate is adjusted for safe spawning (e.g., from 1523 -50 640 in the Overworld to 1523 52 640 in msg:new_end).
- Upon arrival, you will spawn on an obsidian platform with an End portal directly beneath it, allowing you to return to the Overworld.

## Return from msg:new_end

- Jumping into the End portal in msg:new_end will return you to the original coordinates in the Overworld, at the same Y-level where the portal was (e.g., Y = -50).

## Dimensions

- minecraft:the_end → Contains only the dragon fight island with the single biome minecraft:the_end.
- msg:new_end → Resembles the Outer End but has no central island.
